i know, but my level is too low to finish the previous chapters, and i cant find any wiki just yet… a brief summary would do, im dying to know what miss thais is up to…
sighs, sorry for bothering. its just that im struggling so much in the main story. i do want to read it myself too…

||MC, Ramona, William and Ryker go on a mission to the desert, they meet the people there and learn about their culture. MC sees Thais but it seems like only MC can see her. The people here are tricked by Juliette, Juliette is a member of the Lantern Church, they are obsessed with the apocalypse. Juliette plans to destroy the Mother Tree so that D-Slime can spread everywhere. William discovers this plot and is killed by Herbert, the traitor to Mythag and the founder of the sculpture guild. The sculpture guild is also an accomplice of the Lantern Church. MC is almost kidnapped by Cassia and brought to the mysterious force but Ryker saves MC, Ryker wins the bet and N swallows Cassia. Thais uses her power to ask Tawii to fulfill the ancient covenant. So MC and the others purify and destroy the Mother Tree but Juliette escapes. Juliette mentions a Pharaoh so we will probably meet again in the future. In addition to Thais, Ryker and Cassia, there is also Alva in the story, she also had a close relationship with Thais when Thais was alive. After Thais passed away, Alva replaced her to lead the people in the desert, but Juliette tricked her. In chapter 7, 3 essences are also mentioned: Wisdom, Desire and Joy. Corresponding to Tawii, Mother Tree (or Thais) and N. At the end of the story, after William's funeral, MC met Alistair, the first Keeper of Mythag and they discussed something unclear.||
